titel: Strategic Export Controls 2024: War Materiel and Dual-Use Goods.
html: In this document, the government outlines Sweden's export control policy regarding military equipment and dual-use goods for the year 2024. The document also includes a report on the export activities that took place during the year. Furthermore, it describes the cooperation within the European Union (EU) and other international forums concerning the strategic export control of both military equipment and dual-use goods.
tldr: The government has published a report in 2024 detailing the regulations governing the sale of weapons and technology that can be used for both civilian and military purposes. The report outlines what has been sold and how Sweden collaborates with other countries in this area.
lattlast:
The government has published a report detailing how Sweden controls exports to other countries during the year 2024. This report covers military equipment, including weapons and military gear, as well as products with dual-use capabilities – items that can be used for both civilian and military purposes.

The report outlines the volume of these goods that were exported from Sweden during the year. This process, known as export control, is a mechanism to ensure that sensitive technology does not fall into the wrong hands.

The text also describes how Sweden collaborates with other countries within the European Union (EU). Furthermore, Sweden participates in other international groups to establish common regulations regarding which goods can be sold to which countries.
